assumptions: The base height dimension (25 mm) is partially cut off but inferred from geometry.
The cutout radius (15 mm) is inferred from the 30 mm width of the central hole.
No fillets or chamfers are specified; edges remain sharp.
The semi-circular cutout is centered on the left face of the base, with its flat side aligned with the left face.
code:
import cadquery as cq

# Parameters
L = PARAMETERS['overall_length']
W = PARAMETERS['overall_width']
H = PARAMETERS['overall_height']
base_h = PARAMETERS['base_height']
upright_t = PARAMETERS['upright_thickness']
hole_d = PARAMETERS['hole_diameter']
hole_x = PARAMETERS['hole_center_from_left']
slot_w = PARAMETERS['slot_width']
slot_d = PARAMETERS['slot_depth']
cut_r = PARAMETERS['cutout_radius']

# Build L-profile in XY plane
# Base: rectangle L x base_h
# Upright: rectangle upright_t x (H - base_h) attached at right end
base = cq.Workplane("XY").rect(L, base_h).extrude(W)
upright = cq.Workplane("XY").workplane(offset=base_h).rect(upright_t, H - base_h).extrude(W)
main_body = base.union(upright)

# Central through hole: cylinder along Z, center at (hole_x, W/2)
hole = cq.Workplane("XY").workplane(offset=0).circle(hole_d/2).extrude(W)
hole = hole.translate((hole_x, W/2, 0))
main_body = main_body.cut(hole)

# Semi-circular cutout at left end: cylinder of radius cut_r, centered at (0, W/2, base_h/2) and cut only half
cutout = cq.Workplane("XY").workplane(offset=0).circle(cut_r).extrude(W)
cutout = cutout.translate((0, W/2, 0))
# Intersect with a box to get half cylinder (left half)
box = cq.Workplane("XY").box(cut_r*2, W, W).translate((-cut_r, W/2, 0))
cutout_half = cutout.intersect(box)
main_body = main_body.cut(cutout_half)

# Top slot: rectangular pocket on top face of upright
# Top face is at z = H, centered on upright top face
# Upright top face center: (L - upright_t/2, W/2, H)
slot = cq.Workplane("XY").workplane(offset=H - slot_d).rect(slot_w, W).extrude(slot_d)
slot = slot.translate((L - upright_t/2, W/2, H - slot_d))
main_body = main_body.cut(slot)

result = main_body

feature_summary.description: Extruded L-profile with overall dimensions 90x50x60 mm, base height 25 mm, upright thickness 30 mm.
feature_summary.name: L-Shaped Base

feature_summary.description: Through hole of diameter 30 mm, centered 40 mm from left edge.
feature_summary.name: Through Hole

feature_summary.description: Semi-circular cutout of radius 15 mm at the left end, centered on the left face.
feature_summary.name: Semi-circular End Cutout

feature_summary.description: Rectangular slot of width 30 mm and depth 10 mm on the top face of the upright.
feature_summary.name: Rectangular Top Slot

title: L-Shaped Bracket with Holes and Slot
